hero.text: Embrace the challenges, for they are the path to your greatest strengths.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today, your intuition is particularly strong; trust it when making decisions.
aries.love: A surprise encounter could ignite sparks in your love life.
aries.career: Your innovative ideas will gain recognition at work today.

taurus.general: Stability is key for you today; focus on maintaining order in your life.
taurus.love: Deep conversations with your partner will strengthen your bond.
taurus.career: Patience is required; the fruits of your labor will soon reveal themselves.

gemini.general: Communication will be your strongest asset; don't shy away from expressing yourself.
gemini.love: A light-hearted approach could spice up your romantic life today.
gemini.career: Team collaborations are favored; your input will be valued.

cancer.general: Emotional clarity will help you navigate any challenges that arise.
cancer.love: An old flame might resurface, leading to introspection.
cancer.career: Your nurturing nature could help resolve conflicts at work.

leo.general: Confidence is your ally; let your vibrant energy shine today.
leo.love: Romantic gestures will be well-received; don’t hesitate to be bold.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities may come your way; take the lead.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will play a crucial role in your tasks today.
virgo.love: Small acts of kindness can deepen your relationship.
virgo.career: Organizational skills you possess will set you apart today.

libra.general: Seek balance amidst chaos; a calm mind will guide your actions.
libra.love: Harmony in your relationships will bring peace.
libra.career: Collaborative efforts will lead to greater success at work.

scorpio.general: Your passion can drive you to incredible heights; utilize it wisely.
scorpio.love: Honesty in communication will enhance your relationships.
scorpio.career: Transformational opportunities may arise; be ready to adapt.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls! Take a leap of faith on something new.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity can revive an old romance.
sagittarius.career: Creativity will help you stand out in your professional life.

capricorn.general: Hard work is about to pay off; stay focused on your goals.
capricorn.love: Relationships may deepen through shared ambitions.
capricorn.career: Your persistence will be recognized, paving the way for future opportunities.

aquarius.general: Open-mindedness will lead to beneficial new connections today.
aquarius.love: Reach out to friends for advice on romantic matters.
aquarius.career: Innovative solutions to problems will put you in the spotlight.

pisces.general: Embrace your creativity; allow your imagination to flourish.
pisces.love: Artistic activities with your partner can deepen your bond.
pisces.career: Your intuition will guide you toward the right decisions.

professional.text: Success doesn’t come from what you do occasionally, it comes from what you do consistently.
professional.author: Marie Forleo

professional.text: It’s not about ideas. It’s about making ideas happen.
professional.author: Scott Belsky

professional.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused, and surround yourself with good people.
The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow.
Push yourself because no one else is going to do it for you.
Wake up, work out, look hot, kick ass.
Fitness is not about being better than someone else; it’s about being better than you used to be.
Your body can stand almost anything; it’s your mind that you have to convince.
Don’t limit your challenges. Challenge your limits.

captions.text: Caught in a moment of joy.

tech.text: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs!
I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me beach wallpapers.
Why do Java developers wear glasses? Because they can’t C#!
A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks, 'Can I join you?'
There are 10 types of people in the world: those who understand binary and those who don’t.
Why did the programmer quit his job? Because he didn’t get arrays.

fun.text: Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged!
I’m on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
I don't need an inspirational quote. I need coffee.
If I had a dollar for every time I got distracted, I wish I had a puppy.
Adulting is like folding a fitted sheet: no one really knows how.
I finally decided on a career. I want to be a professional procrastinator.

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you.
faith.author: John 14:27

faith.text: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
faith.author: Psalm 23:1

faith.text: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
faith.author: 1 Peter 5:7

faith.text: With God, all things are possible.
faith.author: Matthew 19:26

faith.text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord.
faith.author: Jeremiah 29:11

wisdom.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
wisdom.author: Søren Kierkegaard

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
wisdom.author: Confucius
